item.title: Do Unmute and Take a Break from the Anxiety of Today
item.description: Peace to you, Imgur friend From NWE on Insta https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBgZFUToz6T/?igsh=MWVlM3Jrbmx0bWV1Nw== Lyrics: Ndikhokhele Bawo, zundi kokhele (Lead me oh Father [Lead mel) Ndikhokhele mmeli wami (Lead me my savior) Ezintsizini, Zalomhlaba Bawo (in all the sorrows of this world Father) (Bawo, Bawo, Bawo) (Father, Father, Father) Bawo ndiyabonga (Father I thank you) Ngoba wena usandigcinile (for you still protect/keep me) (Repeat) Thaluthele thuze kwami (You calm all my fears) x2 (Bawo, bawo, bawo) (Father, Father, Father) Bawo ndiyabonga (Father | thank you) Ngoba wena usandigcinile (for you still protect me) Mmeli wami bawo uthaluthele thuze kwami (Father, Savior, you calm my fears) Bawo ndiyabonga (Father I thank you) Ngoba wena usandigcinile (for you still protect me
item.dc:creator: hface18

item.title: I learned a new magic trick!
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/gIVisSorzHI Hopefully this video unlocked your childhood memory of using the Christmas gift wrap paper leftover cardboard tubes as lightsabers! Remember doing the sounds with your mouth too? That's where the inspo for this video comes from haha Have a great day everyone! Yuzu

item.title: HELLO IMGUR TODAY I AM THE SHOUTING BIOLOGIST AND HERE ARE SOME UNCONVENTIONAL SHAPED FOXES
item.description:
THIS IS THE TIBETAN FOX AND HIS HEAD IS VERY SQUARE.
THIS IS A KIT FOX. HE IS SLEEK AND SILVERY AND I LOVE HIM.
THIS IS AN ARCTIC FOX IN THE WINTER. THEY ARE NOT THAT COLOR WHEN IT IS NOT THE WINTER.
THIS IS A DARWIN'S FOX. I DON'T ACTUALLY KNOW WHY HE IS CALLED A DARWIN'S FOX.
AND HERE IS MY ABSOLUTE FAVORITE THE BAT-EARED FOX. LOOK AT THOSE EARS. WHAT A CREATIVE NAME, NAMING AN ANIMAL AFTER ANOTHER ANIMAL!

item.dc:creator: supercerealsteph

item.title: Did I Just Get Threatened?
item.description: This feels like a clear case of voter intimidation. It's vague, yes, but the undertones are there. I contacted the Indiana GOP to verify that it was real and, yes, it's real. Some people, they told me, have been misconstruing it: You see, it only refers to whether you voted or not being public, not who you voted for. How silly of me to misconstrue someone telling me that my family will know whether I voted for Trump or not as being threatening. Edit: I've sent it to the Indiana ACLU and contacted my local news sources about it.
item.dc:creator: Luriden

item.title: Good morning!
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: I am proud to say, I voted and I did not have to do anything else today.
item.description: I posted this earlier https://imgur.com/gallery/Vtfen8j about how me and some friends planned on trying to subvert voter intimidation. As soon as I walked out after voting, there were some magats standing around with various rifles and holding trump flags. Me and the boys were about to set up to offer to walk people inside that were worried about the maga-morons, but the cops showed up. 2 cops talked to the maga-mob and threatened to arrest them if they did not leave. The cops walked them to their trucks and sent them on their way before going to stand by the doors. I talked to them to thank them for that, and they said it was part of the job. They said they would be there all day. So me and the guys went and got them soft coffee and a bag of donuts. I get to spend the rest of Election day at home, drinking last year's batch of mead and eating Chinese takeout, the way God intended. Also, I just wanna say, thank you. All the imgurians on here that offered their support to me and my friends for trying to help other people vote comfortably, you guys are great.
item.dc:creator: drousnavat

item.dc:creator: TheMillenialDream

item.title: Either Bad Math or Bad Corporate Explanation: Amazon night workers walk out after they were expected to work an extra hour for free due to daylight saving
item.description: Amazon employee in Tampa, Florida, said that they and other night shift workers were expected to work extra after clocks fell back an hour on Sunday to mark the end of daylight saving time. As a result, they said everyone left an hour early. In a follow-up video, talking with a superior. The manager—who appeared off camera—appeared to confirm that some Amazon night shift workers didn’t get an extra hours pay. “So for the ones who worked yesterday, if they worked the whole shift are they getting paid 11 hours or just ten?” “Ten hours,” the person replied before the video, which has more than 62,300 views, abruptly ended. It’s not clear that these rules apply to all of Amazon’s night workers, however. In a Reddit thread from 2020, another Amazon worker asked what would happen when the clocks changed. Though the redditor admitted that they were bracing to work an additional hour with no pay, commenters said that wouldn’t be the case. “Let’s say you work 6:30pm – 5:00am, you will clock out at 4:00am,” one viewer wrote. “Clocks roll back at 2.” “We just got a text about it for my FC,” another added. “You work your regular shift including the extra hour and are of course paid for it.” https://www.dailydot.com/news/amazon-worker-unpaid-extra-hour-daylight-savings/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
